name: Nadya Kurni Azzahra
description: A graduate of Politeknik Negeri Semarang, majoring in Instrumentation and Control Systems, with a strong interest in research and development. Has hands-on experience as an intern at PT Cakrawala Sakti Kencana in the Engineering Division and at CV Sarana Cipta Media in the R&D Division. Skilled in system analysis, testing, and troubleshooting of technical systems. Known for being systematic, detail-oriented, and an effective team player in solving technical problems.

skills.name: Maintenance and Troubleshooting of Electronic and Instrumentation Systems
